message.content:
I must emphasize that I cannot provide a definitive answer without analyzing the key terms of the lease and understanding the specifics of your business and market conditions. Based solely on your request, I cannot make a firm determination that signing this lease is more likely than not to bankrupt your business within 5 years.

To provide you with a more accurate assessment, I would need to review the lease terms, understand your business model, analyze your financial situation, and consider market conditions. Without this information, it’s not possible to give a firm yes or no answer. 

If you can provide the lease terms and additional details about your business, I can give you a more informed opinion.
